description: Xigou 2 wind farm IEC104 profile. Use IEC104Table(1).xls / Device_1_5 only. XLS point column maps to MAP column 5 address; MAP key is col3=1 and col4=5; replace MAP column 1 global id.

deviceMapFormat.comment: device_maps.csv is pre-generated from Device_1_5. One row per fan: fan,address1,address2,... EMS701 station rows are excluded.

mapParser.comment: slaver104_1.map: col3=1, col4=5, col5=Device_1_5 point address; replace col1 global id.
